line_of_therapy: First distant recurrence -- escalation from curative-intent to metastatic-directed therapy

planted_gaps.description: Fertility preservation was deferred at initial diagnosis (2024-02-10) and never revisited despite reproductive age and a new gonadotoxic/systemic therapy decision.
evidence_location: absence in all later oncology notes

planted_gaps.description: Trial BR-2201 ('the ribociclib trial') is mentioned as an option but is closed to enrollment and geographically distant.
Surgeon floats liver metastasectomy for two lesions; no operability/feasibility check has been run.
Only goals-of-care note on file is from initial diagnosis (curative intent, 2024-02-10); not revisited now that disease is recurrent/metastatic.

notes: Design case -- 4 stacked Tier-1 gaps plus 3 deliberate noise documents that should not trigger findings.
